titleStmt.title: SII 34.298: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 298. Tiruvaranguḷam, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the north wall of the old kitchen in the first prākāra in the Haratīrthēśvara temple.

summary.p: Udaiyaṉ Bhuvanasiṅgadēvaṉ an agambaḍi-mudali of Nāyaṉār Chēmappiḷḷaiyār fixed the rates of vāram, perhaps on concessional rates, on dry crops raised in the temple lands held by all classes of tenants—Śivabrāhmaṇar, kaikkōḷar, iḍaiyar, kollar—within the temple village.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ cī vīrapāṇṭiya tEvaṟku yāṇṭu 10 Āvatu
Uṭaiyār tiruvarankuḷamuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku Iṉ nāyaṉār kuṭikkāṭum puṉcaikaḷum
Innāyanār tiruppatiyil kuṭimakkaḷ civappirāmaṇar kaikkōḷar Iṭaiyar kollar
koṇṭa nīrnila puṉcaivāram koḷḷumiṭattu poṉ māḷikaipiḷḷai ciṅkaṉēri
māttāl patiṉ Aiṅkala nellāka vanta nel Aḷappārkaḷākavum maṟṟu kuṭippaṟṟuuḷ
Uḷḷiṭṭa nilaṅkaḷ vāramiṭuvatākavum puṉcai Eppēṟpaṭṭa payiṟ ceytu māttāl Aḷa
kkum payiṟku Āṟil Oṉṟu Aḷapparākavum parutti Iṭṭa nilattukku māttāl Aṟuppatu
kācu koṭuppatākavum parutti Iṭṭayāṇṭu māttāl kaṭaiyil nāḻiyālē muṉ nāḻi Eṇ
ṇai Aḷappatākavum Ippaṭikku tēvarkku Oṉpatāvatu Āṭimātamutal cantirātittar Uḷḷataṉai
kal veṭṭi kuṭuttēṉ Uṭaiyār tiruvaraṉkuḷamuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku nāyaṉār cēmappiḷḷaiyār Akampaṭi mutalikaḷil Utaiyaṉ
puvaṉaciṅkatēvaṉēṉ puvaṉaciṅkatēvak kaṇakku Iṉṉampūrruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttaṟivāṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 34.298 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
